bio.en: Multimedia Engineer specializing in motion graphics, animation, and audiovisual design. I create animated pieces, video edits, and visual content using After Effects, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, and Illustrator. Certified by Vancouver Film School in Motion Graphics, with experience developing educational, advertising, and digital content. I combine analytical thinking, creativity, and attention to detail to produce clear, engaging animations with purpose.
bio.es: Ingeniero Multimedia con enfoque en motion graphics, animación y diseño audiovisual. Creo piezas animadas, ediciones de video y contenido visual usando After Effects, Premiere Pro, Photoshop e Illustrator. Certificado por Vancouver Film School en Motion Graphics, con experiencia desarrollando contenido educativo, publicitario y digital. Combino pensamiento analítico, creatividad y atención al detalle para producir animaciones claras, atractivas y con propósito.
